name: todoist
description: Reads projects, sections, tasks, comments, labels, and project collaborators, and writes project/section/task/comment/label create, update, and delete actions (plus task close/reopen), through the Todoist REST API.

risk.read: external Todoist API read of project, section, task, comment, label, and collaborator data
risk.write: external Todoist API mutation: creates, updates, or deletes projects/sections/tasks/comments/labels, and closes/reopens tasks
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan approval required before writes; delete actions on projects/sections/tasks/comments/labels are irreversible
